ddls:
CREATE TABLE "share_classes" (
  "share_class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each share class */,
  "share_class_name" TEXT /* Name of the share class (e.g., A, B, Y) */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which dividends are paid */,
  "dividend_rate" REAL /* Default dividend rate for the share class */,
  "payment_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of dividend payments (e.g., quarterly, annually) */,
  "minimum_holdings" INTEGER /* Minimum number of shares required to receive dividends */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("share_class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dividends" (
  "dividend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dividend payment */,
  "share_class_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the share class associated with the dividend */,
  "pay_date" TEXT /* Date the dividend is paid */,
  "dividend_paid_in" TEXT /* Unit in which the dividend is paid (e.g., pence, cents) */,
  "dividend_rate" REAL /* Rate of the dividend payment */,
  "dividend_type" TEXT /* Type of dividend (e.g., cash, stock) */,
  "record_date" TEXT /* Date used to determine eligible shareholders */,
  "ex_dividend_date" TEXT /* Date after which new shareholders are not eligible */,
  "currency_code" TEXT /* Currency code for the dividend payment */,
  "is_annual" INTEGER /* Indicator if the dividend is part of an annual payment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dividend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dividends_share_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("share_class_id") REFERENCES share_classes ("share_class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dividends_currency_code FOREIGN KEY ("currency_code") REFERENCES currencies ("currency_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "shareholders" (
  "shareholder_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shareholder */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the shareholder */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the shareholder */,
  "share_class_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the share class owned by the shareholder */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the shareholder */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the shareholder */,
  "number_of_shares" INTEGER /* Number of shares held by the shareholder */,
  "preferred_payment_method_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the preferred payment method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shareholder_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shareholders_share_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("share_class_id") REFERENCES share_classes ("share_class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shareholders_preferred_payment_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("preferred_payment_method_id") REFERENCES payment_methods ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dividend_payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment transaction */,
  "dividend_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dividend payment associated with the transaction */,
  "shareholder_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the shareholder receiving the payment */,
  "amount_paid" REAL /* Amount paid to the shareholder */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the payment method used */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., pending, completed, failed) */,
  "currency_code" TEXT /* Currency code of the payment */,
  "converted_amount" REAL /* Converted amount if the payment is in a different currency */,
  "conversion_rate" REAL /* Exchange rate used for conversion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dividend_payments_dividend_id FOREIGN KEY ("dividend_id") REFERENCES dividends ("dividend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dividend_payments_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("method_id") REFERENCES payment_methods ("method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dividend_payments_currency_code FOREIGN KEY ("currency_code") REFERENCES currencies ("currency_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dividend_payments_shareholder_id FOREIGN KEY ("shareholder_id") REFERENCES shareholders ("shareholder_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "currencies" (
  "currency_code" TEXT /* ISO currency code (e.g., GBP, EUR) */,
  "currency_name" TEXT /* Name of the currency */,
  "exchange_rate" REAL /* Current exchange rate relative to a base currency */,
  "base_currency" TEXT /* Base currency for exchange rate calculations */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the exchange rate was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("currency_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the payment method (e.g., Bank Transfer, Check) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the payment method */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicator if the payment method is currently active */,
  "instructions" TEXT /* Additional instructions or details about the payment method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_management" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username used for system login */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for secure authentication */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, financial analyst) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action taken */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the action was performed */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the action was performed */,
  "action_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the action taken */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_management ("user_id")
)
